statement.en: The evaluation of kinetic and static perimetry practice in neuro-ophthalmology

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a clinical practice evaluation paper (dated 2026, future date) comparing diagnostic methodologies in neuro-ophthalmology. The validity of findings depends on empirical validation, clinical outcomes data, and peer review not yet completed. Categorized as FLOWING because: (1) future publication date indicates preprint/provisional status, (2) empirical medical claims require clinical validation, (3) methodology comparisons are subject to refinement based on evidence accumulation.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 視野の暗さが積分されるとき、光の欠落が網膜上の真実を明かす。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 眼球のなかで光と暗闇が対称に踊り、中心の秘密が周辺を支配する。
